prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-ASRO-GEMFUCHSITE-5LB-BUN Product Type: LOOSE_CUT_GEM Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 5lb Rough Fuchsite Gemstone Mineral Paydirt Bag Description: Discover the excitement of gemstone prospecting with the ASR Outdoor Authentic Rough Fuchsite Paydirt! Each 5lb bag is filled with high-quality, raw Fuchsite, sourced directly from Brazil. This carefully curated material provides an exciting and rewarding panning or sifting experience, perfect for both beginners and seasoned hobbyists alike. As you sift through the paydirt, you’ll have the opportunity to clean, polish, and admire your very own Fuchsite, known for its sparkling, metallic luster and distinctive green color, making it one of the most sought-after varieties due to its quality and striking appearance.

Whether you’re just starting out or you’re a seasoned prospector, this gemstone paydirt bag offers the perfect way to learn about geology, gemstone identification, and discover hidden gems. The 5lb bag contains a unique mix of rough Fuchsite, making each experience one-of-a-kind. With every sift, you’ll have the chance to uncover beautiful, rare gemstones, turning every discovery into an exciting moment!

This paydirt is ideal for rockhounds or gemstone collectors, making it a great gift for anyone who enjoys the thrill of the find. Whether for yourself or a loved one, this bag offers endless fun and the potential for a valuable and rewarding discovery.

Each bag contains 5lb of carefully selected material, with individual gem weights ranging from 20-40 grams, all 100% authentic and sourced from Brazil. Treat yourself to an unforgettable mining adventure or give the gift of discovery today! Search Terms: geology; gemstone dig kit; fossils; paleontology; archeology; mining science kits; crystals and stones; rockhounding tools; crystal; outdoor gear; camping accessories; sporting goods; mining tools Features: - AUTHENTIC GEMSTONES - This bag of paydirt comes with 5lb of high-quality Rough Fuchsite sourced directly from Brazil, known for its sparkling, metallic luster and distinctive green color, making it one of the most sought-after varieties due to its quality and striking appearance. - DIVERSE PAYDIRT EXPERIENCE - Featuring 5lb of carefully curated material, this bag of gemstones provides a fun and rewarding mineral sifting experience; Discover, clean, and polish your very own gemstones out in the field! - IDEAL FOR HOBBYISTS - Gemstone paydirt bags are perfect for rockhounds and gemstone collectors, beginner to expert-level, and everything in between with the potential to uncover rare gemstones while learning about and studying geology. - EXCITING DISCOVERY - Each bag is unique, offering the chance to find beautiful, one-of-a-kind stones and other hidden gems; Makes a great gift idea for your favorite rockhound, geologist, or gemstone collector. - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: Rough Fuchsite; Bag size: 5lb; Individual gem weight: 20 - 40 grams; Sourced from: Brazil; 100% authentic minerals === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5lb Rough Green Fuchsite Gemstone Paydirt
